checks.description: Repositories containing sensitive code should be private
checks.query: select name_with_owner, visibility, is_private from github_my_repository

checks.description: Private repositories should restrict forking
checks.query: select name_with_owner, forking_allowed, is_private from github_my_repository where is_private = true and forking_allowed = true

checks.description: Default branch should restrict who can push
checks.query: select repository_full_name, pattern, restricts_pushes from github_branch_protection where repository_full_name = 'RupinderSecurity/openframp'

checks.description: Default branch should have branch protection rules
checks.query: select repository_full_name, pattern, requires_approving_reviews, required_approving_review_count, is_admin_enforced from github_branch_protection where repository_full_name = 'RupinderSecurity/openframp'

checks.description: Branch protection should block force pushes
checks.query: select repository_full_name, pattern, allows_force_pushes from github_branch_protection where repository_full_name = 'RupinderSecurity/openframp'

checks.description: Branch protection should block branch deletions
checks.query: select repository_full_name, pattern, allows_deletions from github_branch_protection where repository_full_name = 'RupinderSecurity/openframp'

checks.description: Branch protection should require last push approval by someone other than the pusher
checks.query: select repository_full_name, pattern, require_last_push_approval from github_branch_protection where repository_full_name = 'RupinderSecurity/openframp'

checks.description: Repositories should require web commit sign-off for audit trail
checks.query: select name_with_owner, web_commit_signoff_required from github_my_repository

checks.description: Repositories should have a security policy (SECURITY.md)
checks.query: select name_with_owner, is_security_policy_enabled from github_my_repository

checks.description: Repositories should have a license defined
checks.query: select name_with_owner, license_info from github_my_repository

checks.description: Repositories should delete branches after merge to reduce attack surface
checks.query: select name_with_owner, delete_branch_on_merge from github_my_repository

checks.description: Repositories should have a README file
checks.query: select repository_full_name, readme from github_community_profile where repository_full_name = 'RupinderSecurity/openframp'

checks.description: Repositories should have a CONTRIBUTING guide
checks.query: select repository_full_name, contributing from github_community_profile where repository_full_name = 'RupinderSecurity/openframp'

checks.description: Repositories should have a code of conduct
checks.query: select repository_full_name, code_of_conduct from github_community_profile where repository_full_name = 'RupinderSecurity/openframp'

checks.description: Repository default branch should be named 'main' (not 'master')
checks.query: select name_with_owner, default_branch_ref from github_my_repository

checks.description: Branch protection should require pull request reviews before merging
checks.query: select repository_full_name, pattern, requires_approving_reviews, required_approving_review_count from github_branch_protection where repository_full_name = 'RupinderSecurity/openframp'

checks.description: Branch protection should require status checks to pass
checks.query: select repository_full_name, pattern, requires_status_checks, requires_strict_status_checks from github_branch_protection where repository_full_name = 'RupinderSecurity/openframp'

checks.description: Branch protection should require conversation resolution before merging
checks.query: select repository_full_name, pattern, requires_conversation_resolution from github_branch_protection where repository_full_name = 'RupinderSecurity/openframp'

checks.description: Branch protection should dismiss stale PR approvals when new commits are pushed
checks.query: select repository_full_name, pattern, dismisses_stale_reviews from github_branch_protection where repository_full_name = 'RupinderSecurity/openframp'

checks.description: Branch protection should suggest updating out-of-date branches
checks.query: select repository_full_name, pattern, allow_update_branch from github_my_repository where name_with_owner = 'RupinderSecurity/openframp'

checks.description: Repository wikis should be disabled unless actively used
checks.query: select name_with_owner, has_wiki_enabled from github_my_repository

checks.description: Active repositories should not be archived
checks.query: select name_with_owner, is_archived from github_my_repository where is_archived = true

checks.description: Repositories should have descriptions for inventory clarity
checks.query: select name_with_owner, description from github_my_repository

checks.description: Repositories should have topics for discoverability and categorization
checks.query: select name_with_owner, topics from github_my_repository

checks.description: Repositories should have Dependabot vulnerability alerts enabled
checks.query: select name_with_owner, has_vulnerability_alerts_enabled from github_my_repository

checks.description: Repositories should not have open critical Dependabot alerts
checks.query: select alert_number, state, repository_full_name from github_repository_dependabot_alert where repository_full_name = 'RupinderSecurity/openframp' and state = 'open'

checks.description: Branch protection should require code owner reviews
checks.query: select repository_full_name, pattern, requires_code_owner_reviews from github_branch_protection where repository_full_name = 'RupinderSecurity/openframp'

checks.description: Repositories should have a CODEOWNERS file for review accountability
checks.query: select repository_full_name, line, pattern, users, teams from github_code_owner where repository_full_name = 'RupinderSecurity/openframp'

checks.description: GitHub Actions should use environment secrets for sensitive values
checks.query: select name, repository_full_name from github_actions_repository_secret where repository_full_name = 'RupinderSecurity/openframp'

checks.description: Branch protection should require signed commits
checks.query: select repository_full_name, pattern, requires_commit_signatures from github_branch_protection where repository_full_name = 'RupinderSecurity/openframp'

checks.description: Branch protection should require linear history
checks.query: select repository_full_name, pattern, requires_linear_history from github_branch_protection where repository_full_name = 'RupinderSecurity/openframp'

checks.description: Recent GitHub Actions workflow runs should be passing
checks.query: select name, conclusion, head_branch from github_actions_repository_workflow_run where repository_full_name = 'RupinderSecurity/openframp' order by created_at desc limit 5
